message:
fix(server): spawn sentinel-failover test replicas with a tmp redis.conf (br-frankenredis-oayf)

tcp_sentinel_failover_integration calls CONFIG REWRITE on each replica
as part of the sentinel-driven failover flow. Upstream Redis (and our
impl, correctly) returns "ERR The server is running without a config
file" when REWRITE has no file to rewrite; since spawn_frankenredis
booted the three nodes without --config, the test failed.

Fix: add spawn_frankenredis_opts_with_config which writes a minimal
stub redis.conf ("bind 127.0.0.1\nappendonly no\n") to a unique tmp
dir and passes --config <path>, plus a spawn_frankenredis_with_config_file
thin wrapper. Swap the three spawn_frankenredis calls in
tcp_sentinel_failover_integration to the new wrapper. Other call sites
keep the original spawn_frankenredis path (default: no --config) so
the behaviour for the rest of the suite is unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
